prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Dawncrest in layered blue robes; Celestia gently lays a weathered quest map onto a wooden tavern table, Ren leans in closely, their floating spell tags casting a soft glow as they begin to examine the map together, warm tavern lighting, anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Dawncrest gestures with gloved hands, causing glowing arcane runes to hover over the map, Celestia Vale points to a specific coordinate on the parchment, both characters nod in synchronization as they decipher the magical path, consistent camera angle and lighting, no text, no watermark.
